inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar mehsoos kar rahi hoon, sar dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fevers

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Though possible, typhoid typically presents with more severe symptoms

inputs.text: Meri bukhar roz badh rahi hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai aur kabz hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal pain are indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause abdominal pain and fever, but the step-wise pattern is more suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fevers typically do not present with abdominal pain and constipation

inputs.text: Ab toh tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai aur bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai
inputs.image_desc: red rash on arms and chest

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness, along with the presence of a rash, is highly suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: While gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea and abdominal pain, the systemic symptoms and rash point more towards typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause fever and weakness, but the specific pattern of symptoms and the rash are not typical for malaria

inputs.text: Main bahut thak gayi hoon, bukhar abhi bhi hai aur pet dard bhi badh gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistence of high fever, worsening abdominal pain, and signs of dehydration confirm the diagnosis of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific progression of symptoms and the presence of systemic signs

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of specific symptoms such as chills and the pattern of fever
